extensionDescription.message: Automatically reject cookie consent banners. Privacy-first, open source.

popupUnavailable.description: Shown when the current page URL cannot be determined

popupToastRemovedWhitelist.description: Toast shown after removing domain from whitelist

popupToastAddedWhitelist.description: Toast shown after adding domain to whitelist

popupToastConnectionError.description: Toast shown when background communication fails

popupStatusWhitelisted.description: Domain status when the current site is whitelisted

popupStatusBannerRejected.description: Domain status when a banner was successfully rejected

popupStatusBannerHidden.description: Domain status when a banner was hidden in aggressive mode

popupStatusBannerSkipped.description: Domain status when a banner was left visible

popupWhitelistRemove.description: Button text to remove domain from whitelist

popupWhitelistAdd.description: Button text to add domain to whitelist

popupStatusNoBanner.description: Domain status when no banner has been seen on this site

popupLogHeaderTime.description: Log table header for timestamp column

popupLogHeaderDomain.description: Log table header for domain column

popupLogHeaderAction.description: Log table header for action column

popupLogHeaderMethod.description: Log table header for method column

popupLogHeaderDetail.description: Log table header for detail column

popupLogEmpty.description: Shown when the action log is empty

popupDevLabelProvider.description: Dev tab label for detected provider

popupDevLabelDetection.description: Dev tab label for detection method

popupDevLabelContainer.description: Dev tab label for container element

popupDevLabelAction.description: Dev tab label for performed action

popupDevLabelResult.description: Dev tab label for result detail

popupDevLabelLastSeen.description: Dev tab label for last detection timestamp

popupDevNoBanner.message: No banner detected on this page
popupDevNoBanner.description: Dev tab status when no banner has been detected

popupDevOpenPage.message: Open a page to see detection info
popupDevOpenPage.description: Dev tab placeholder when no domain is active

popupConfirmReset.message: Reset all statistics? This cannot be undone.

popupToastLogNoEntries.description: Toast when there are no log entries to copy

popupToastLogCopied.description: Toast when log was successfully copied

popupToastPickerFailed.description: Toast when element picker fails to start

popupLogCopyLabel.description: Button label to copy log to clipboard

popupPickerHint.message: Click an element on the page to capture a custom selector. Press Esc to cancel.
popupPickerHint.description: Hint text for the element picker

popupPickerStart.description: Button to start the element picker

popupSectionProviders.description: Section heading for known provider list

popupSectionCustomSelectors.description: Section heading for custom selectors list

popupCustomSelectorsEmpty.description: Placeholder when no custom selectors exist

popupSelectorLoading.description: Loading text for provider selector list

popupSelectorEmpty.description: Error text when provider list fails to load

popupWhitelistSection.description: Section heading for whitelist domain list

popupWhitelistEmpty.description: Placeholder when no domains are whitelisted

popupDevStatusOpen.message: Open a page to see detection info
popupDevStatusOpen.description: Dev tab status when no domain is active

popupDevStatusNoBanner.message: No banner detected on this page
popupDevStatusNoBanner.description: Dev tab status when no banner was detected
